title: Force clean JSON from a model
problem: A model keeps replying with prose and markdown when you need machine-readable data. Write a system prompt that makes it return ONLY a JSON object with keys 'sentiment' and 'score' (0 to 1). No markdown, no extra words, no code fences.
context:
Weak prompt: "Tell me how this review feels: '{review}'"

Typical reply:
"Sure! This review sounds quite positive — I'd say about 0.9 confidence 😊"
hints: A system prompt sets rules the model must obey on every reply.
Tell it the exact output shape and forbid everything else.
The words 'return ONLY valid JSON' and 'no markdown' matter a lot.
